violations.text: The doors to the outside, located at the entrance, are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Owner/operator has materials needed and is to install. New Violation. Correct By: 12/24/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of brown/black residue and other debris. Ice machine is to be cleaned. New Violation. Correct By: 12/17/2025
